seo.title: Brandon Oechsner | EE Portfolio
seo.description: EE student at Midwestern State University building at the intersection of embedded systems, automation, and precision fabrication.

footer.tagline: Building at the intersection of hardware and code.

hero.headline: Brandon Oechsner
hero.description: EE student at Midwestern State University building at the intersection of embedded systems, automation, and precision fabrication. Currently interning at Pratt & Whitney and United Regional Health Care System.

projects.label: Work
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Hardware and software projects — embedded systems, DSP, and precision CAD.

skills.label: Capabilities
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical proficiencies across embedded systems, signal processing, CAD, and fabrication.

experience.description: Supporting aerospace engineering operations at one of the world's leading aircraft engine manufacturers. Hands-on exposure to precision manufacturing and engineering systems.
Developing robotic process automation solutions for healthcare system workflows. Designing and deploying automated processes to improve operational efficiency.
Coursework spanning DSP, embedded systems, circuit analysis, and controls. Hands-on lab work including FIR/IIR filter implementation on TMS320C6748 DSP hardware.

projects.title: Arduino Robotic Arm
projects.description: Multi-axis robotic arm built from scratch using an Arduino UNO, MG996R high-torque servos, and fully custom 3D-printed structural components designed in Onshape for the Bambu Lab P1S printer.

projects.title: FIR / IIR Filter Implementation
projects.description: Designed and deployed FIR and IIR digital filters in MATLAB and on a TMS320C6748 DSP board via Code Composer Studio. Applications include echo generation, audio signal shaping, and filter frequency analysis.

projects.title: Marquise Diamond Engagement Ring
projects.description: Parametric engagement ring design in Onshape featuring a custom marquise diamond setting with a flower petal prong aesthetic. Constructed using loft-based prong geometry with guide curves.

models.description: CAD models and printable STL files from my projects. Designed in Onshape, sliced for the Bambu Lab P1S. Free to use for personal builds.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something.
contact.subtext: Open to full-time opportunities after graduation, collaborations on hardware projects, or just talking shop about embedded systems and fabrication.
